cards.name: 2 of Wands, reversed
cards.interpretation: bad planning, overanalyzing, not taking action, playing it safe, avoiding risk

cards.name: Ⅹ Wheel of Fortune, reversed
cards.interpretation: bad luck, lack of control, clinging to control, unwelcome changes, delays

cards.name: 9 of Cups, reversed
cards.interpretation: unhappiness, lack of fulfilment, disappointment, underachievement, arrogance, snobbery
